sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id INTEGER, event_time TIMESTAMP, value NUMERIC);
SELECT id, hour(event_time) - (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_dates t2 WHERE t2.value IS NULL) AS hour_difference FROM test_dates WHERE value + 1 > 50 ORDER BY hour_difference DESC;
SELECT id, hour(event_time) AS hour_extracted, value FROM test_dates WHERE hour(event_time) - 2 = 10 GROUP BY hour_extracted, value HAVING SUM(value) IS NOT NULL;

SELECT dt.id, hour(dt.event_time) - COALESCE(NULLIF(SUM(value), 0), 1) AS hour_adjusted FROM test_dates dt JOIN (SELECT id, hour(event_time) FROM test_dates WHERE event_time < TIMESTAMP '2023-01-01 00:00:00') sub ON dt.id = sub.id GROUP BY dt.id, hour_adjusted HAVING hour_adjusted > 0;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_summary AS SELECT hour(event_time) AS hour, SUM(value) AS total_value FROM test_dates GROUP BY hour;
SELECT hour, total_value - (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM temp_summary WHERE hour < 10) AS adjusted_value FROM temp_summary WHERE adjusted_value IS NOT NULL ORDER BY adjusted_value;
SELECT dt.id, hour(dt.event_time) - CAST('3' AS INTEGER) AS hour_shifted FROM (SELECT * FROM test_dates WHERE value IS NOT NULL) dt WHERE hour_shifted >= 0;
